highlights_headline: This unreleased build ports SKPMColor math to managed code and updates the WASM runtime.

bullets.lead: SKPMColor premultiply and unpremultiply ported to managed integer math
bullets.detail: Single-value SKPMColor premultiplication and unpremultiplication now run as pure managed integer arithmetic, avoiding a native round-trip for these hot-path operations.

bullets.lead: WASM runtime built with Emscripten 5.0.6 and new exception handling
bullets.detail: The WebAssembly native libraries are rebuilt with Emscripten 5.0.6 using the new exnref-based exception handling model.
